name: Lemon Dill Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Nonfat Vegetable Broth, Low Sodium
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except chicken breast halves in a glass or plastic dish.
2. Add chicken; turn to coat with marinade. Cover and refrigerate at least 3 hours.
NOTE: Original recipe was 1/8 teaspoon salt.
3. Set oven control to broil. Spray broiler pan with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Remove chicken from marinade. Place in pan.
5. Broil chicken 5-7 inches from heat for 7 minutes; turn.
6. Broil about 7 minutes longer, or until juice runs clear.
Serves 6
I marinated them all day. It did take longer than the specified time to cook them. I used my toaster oven to broil them.
This recipe has an incredible flavor.
Entered into MasterCook and tested for you by Reggie & Jeff Dwork (reggie@reggie.com)
